name: TypeScript + Go monorepo
description: Monorepo with TypeScript React frontend and Go Gin backend. Tests parallel subagent dispatch, per-language code-style file generation, subdirectory path scoping, and .tsx exclusion from backend rules.
expected_behavior: Detects monorepo from multiple language configs at top level (package.json + go.mod)
Spawns parallel subagents: structure+config analyzer + TypeScript source analyzer + Go source analyzer
Generates per-language code-style files: code-style-typescript.md and code-style-go.md
Scopes TypeScript paths to frontend/ subdirectory (e.g., frontend/src/**/*.{ts,tsx})
Scopes Go paths to backend/ subdirectory (e.g., backend/**/*.go)
Defers TypeScript formatting rules to Prettier
Defers Go static analysis rules to golangci-lint
Generates testing.md covering both test patterns (*.test.tsx and *_test.go)
Presents generation plan with per-language file list and waits for user confirmation
